children.feature_description:
Product recommendations for
  sales reps — syncs recommendation data from the backend at
  startup

Outlet visit plan for sales
  reps — syncs PJP data from the backend and stores locally for
  offline access

Employee attendance marking
  and monthly dashboard. Tab 1: form-driven attendance
  submission (Working/Leave/Meeting). Tab 2: calendar view with
  monthly stats and status counts.

nodes.node_description: Configure task cards for field reps — toggle on/off, reorder, and edit labels and data points

config.label: Task Cards
config.description: Configure tasks for field reps — toggle on/off, reorder by dragging, and click the edit icon to modify labels and data points.

list_options.label: Sales Target
list_options.description: Daily target assigned to each user to achieve through outlet visits

list_options.label: Must Order Outlets
list_options.description: Number of outlets where order probability is too high and must be billed

list_options.label: Focus Products
list_options.description: Priority products that reps must push and sell across their assigned route

item_fields.label: Card Title
item_fields.description: Title text on the task card.

item_fields.label: Card Subtitle
item_fields.description: Subtitle text on the task card.

nodes.node_description: Select and configure KPI scorecards — toggle on/off, reorder, edit labels and data points

config.label: KPI Scorecards
config.description: Select and configure KPI scorecards — toggle on/off, reorder by dragging, and click the edit icon to modify labels and data points.

list_options.label: Sales Value
list_options.description: Track monthly and quarterly sales achievement against targets

list_options.label: Productive Call
list_options.description: Measure field visit productivity and PJP compliance

list_options.label: Focus Products
list_options.description: Track focus product distribution and sales targets

list_options.label: TLSR
list_options.description: Total line selling rate across outlet visits

nodes.node_description: Select store-level activities and configure the data capture form for each. Use advanced settings to customize fields.

children.activity_description: Capture shelf displays, planogram compliance, and product visibility at outlets
Track competitor product presence, pricing, and promotions at retail outlets

nodes.node_description: Select reports to include in your app. Click on a report to configure its filters.
Visual branding overrides — colors, logos, fonts

config.label: Primary Color
config.description: Main brand colour — app bar, buttons, accents

config.label: Primary Dark Color
config.description: Darker shade — status bar and dark variants

config.label: Accent Color
config.description: Secondary colour — FABs, selection controls, highlights

config.label: Login Banner
config.description: Hero banner on the login screen — PNG, SVG, JPG up to 5MB

config.label: Banner Asset Path
config.description: Local asset fallback for login banner (e.g. assets/images/banner.png)

config.label: Font Family
config.description: Custom font family name — null uses system default

config.label: Blob Base URL
config.description: Base URL for resolving blob keys to image URLs

config.label: Terms & Conditions URL
config.description: Full URL to T&C document (PDF or image)

config.label: Privacy Policy URL
config.description: Full URL to Privacy Policy document (PDF or image)
